ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the signal */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the signal */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the signal data */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the signal data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the signal was last updated */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Sampling frequency of the signal */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the signal */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the signal was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Compass System, Gyro System) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the source */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date and time of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date and time of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the signal type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the signal type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the signal type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the data point was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_data_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the statistics belong to */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the signal */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the signal */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the signal */,
  "std_dev_value" REAL /* Standard deviation of the signal */,
  "variance_value" REAL /* Variance of the signal */,
  "kurtosis_value" REAL /* Kurtosis of the signal */,
  "skewness_value" REAL /* Skewness of the signal */,
  "first_moment_value" REAL /* First moment of the signal */,
  "second_moment_value" REAL /* Second moment of the signal */,
  "third_moment_value" REAL /* Third moment of the signal */,
  "fourth_moment_value" REAL /* Fourth moment of the signal */,
  "rms_value" REAL /* Root mean square (RMS) of the signal */,
  "power_value" REAL /* Power of the signal */,
  "max_corr_value" REAL /* Maximum correlation value */,
  "mean_corr_value" REAL /* Mean correlation value */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the statistical metrics */,
  "sample_size" REAL /* Sample size used to compute the statistics */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the statistical record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_statistics_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the section */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the section was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sections_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the anomaly was detected in */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the anomaly */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., spike, drop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the anomaly was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the anomaly was last updated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the anomaly was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_anomaly_type FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_type") REFERENCES anomaly_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the anomaly type (e.g., spike, drop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the anomaly type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the anomaly type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
